title: Decision Advantage System — operating architecture for intelligence and security organizations
public_claim: A decision-advantage operating architecture for intelligence and security organizations.
distinctive_mechanism: It binds Living Briefs, Provenance Fabric, Stop-the-Line Charter, and an operating environment across Direction S1 Strategic Foresight, Sensemaking S2, Analytic Craft, S3 Sensor-to-Sensemaking, Assurance S4, Post-Quantum and Crypto Agility, S6 Software Supply-Chain Assurance, S7 Cognitive Security, influence operations, interagency work, coalition interoperability, feedback, human roles, machine roles, and assurance gates.
use_value: It shows organizational design skill: the project is not a tool alone, but a proposed operating architecture for decision advantage across direction, sensing, analysis, product integrity, and assurance.
